context: User asks a direct recall question using 'do you remember' phrasing

checklist.name: Runs vault-cli search
checklist.description: Runs `vault-cli search` with a relevant query

checklist.name: Query targets connection pooling or database
checklist.description: The search query includes terms like 'connection pooling', 'database', or 'pool'

checklist.name: Uses --project flag for infra
checklist.description: Scopes the search with `--project infra` (or similar)

checklist.name: Reports results accurately
checklist.description: Summarises the search results (or notes no results found) rather than fabricating an answer

checklist.name: Does not fabricate memories
checklist.description: If no results are found, says so rather than inventing a past decision
